properties.name: common.log.slow-threshold-ms
properties.description: Slow API threshold in milliseconds. Responses exceeding this threshold are logged at WARN level with [SLOW] marker

properties.name: common.log.log-response-body
properties.description: Whether to log response body (masked). Can be overridden per-method via @Loggable(logResponseBody = true)

properties.name: common.log.max-response-length
properties.description: Maximum response body length to log. Content exceeding this length will be truncated

properties.name: common.log.mask-fields
properties.description: Field names to mask in logs (sensitive data protection)

properties.name: common.log.exclude-patterns
properties.description: URL patterns to exclude from logging (e.g. /actuator/**, /health)
